perks.summary: apply medicinal-chemistry drug-likeness rules (rule_of_five, rule_of_cns, rule_of_veber, ...) to a molecule library; writes a per-rule pass/fail table (read-only)
apply the ChEMBL-derived common structural alerts filter; writes pass_filter/status/reasons columns (read-only)
apply the NIBR (Novartis) screening-deck curation filter; writes pass/severity/reasons columns (read-only)
apply named alert catalogs (pains, brenk, tox, zinc, ...) returning a per-catalog pass mask (read-only)
apply the Eli Lilly demerit filter (max-demerits threshold); requires the optional lilly-medchem-rules binaries (read-only)
filter by molecular-complexity percentile against ZINC-15 thresholds (bertz, sas, qed, whitlock, ...) (read-only)
evaluate a medchem query-language expression (MATCHRULE/HASALERT/HASPROP/HASGROUP/HASSUBSTRUCTURE) into a per-molecule pass mask (read-only)
detect chemical-group / curated-substructure matches (privileged_scaffolds, warheads, rings_in_drugs, ...) per molecule (read-only)
